title: Principal Plant Manager at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises!
